title: Spidye's Resourcepack
description:
A resourcepack made by me :D

At the moment the pack is primarily GUI changes making it give off a lofi theme using my favorite color blue.
body: The goal of this resource pack is to give off a lofi vibe. I primarily use the color blue as that is my favorite. I alter mostly the GUI system for all this while also providing a couple retextures for certain items. This includes a colored bow, short swords, and darker blue diamond texture.
